name: Might of the Seraphs
description: Seraph-grade Eridian relic from Borderlands 2: Campaign of Carnage. Obtained by trading with the Seraph Vendor in the Badass Crater of Badassitude.
notes: A level 61 Very Rare (purple) Strength Relic can equal the stat boost of a level 50 Might of the Seraphs, but at the same level this relic provides stronger bonuses. The tagline nods to the classic "unstoppable force" versus "immovable object" paradox.

special.description: Grants up to +51% melee damage and up to +51% cooldown rate for melee override skills. Affected overrides include: Hellfire Halitosis (Krieg) 15s to 9.9s, Scorn (Maya) 18s to 11.9s, Fistful of Hurt (Salvador) 15s to 9.9s.
special.title: Become the unstoppable force!
